title:
NEW $100 USDC BOUNTY IN: 

We are teaming up with @Uglycash Africa to launch the UGLYCASH Portfolio

audit.reason: The bounty details are clear, comprehensive, and well-structured. The criteria for following top traders and the required format for portfolio documentation are detailed and specific, providing a clear roadmap for participants.
audit.improvements: Consider adding more specific examples or templates for the portfolio documentation sections to help participants understand the expected depth and format of their submissions. Additionally, providing more details on how rewards will be distributed could enhance clarity and motivate participation.
